mode.description: Delivery guarantee. Consumers must be idempotent.
mode.title: Mode

idempotency_key.description: Stable deduplication key produced by the message originator.
idempotency_key.title: Idempotency Key

attempt.description: Current delivery attempt, starting from one.
attempt.title: Attempt

max_attempts.description: Maximum delivery attempts allowed by the routing policy.
max_attempts.title: Max Attempts

priority.description: Queue priority assigned by the deterministic routing policy.

available_at.description: Earliest UTC time at which the message may be dispatched.
available_at.title: Available At

expires_at.description: UTC expiry after which the message must not be executed.
expires_at.title: Expires At

schema_version.description: Wire version for the standard Topic 3 error receipt.
schema_version.title: Schema Version

error_code.description: Stable machine-readable error code from the shared error catalog.
error_code.title: Error Code

category.description: Error ownership category such as CONTRACT, PROVIDER, or TIMEOUT.
category.title: Category

severity.description: Operational severity; it does not encode academic correctness.

retriable.description: Whether infrastructure policy permits another delivery attempt.
retriable.title: Retriable

safe_message.description: Redacted message safe for logs and authorized clients.
safe_message.title: Safe Message

details_ref.description: Restricted artifact reference for diagnostics; never raw secrets.
details_ref.title: Details Ref

occurred_at.description: UTC time at which the error occurred.
occurred_at.title: Occurred At

agent.description: Producing Topic 3 agent; null for platform infrastructure events.

service.description: Stable producing service name from deployment metadata.
service.title: Service

instance_id.description: Ephemeral process or worker instance identity.
instance_id.title: Instance Id

build_version.description: Immutable producer build version used for provenance.
build_version.title: Build Version

resource_type.description: Frozen Topic 3 resource family owning the payload.

blueprint_id.description: Immutable blueprint identity from Topic 3 orchestration.
blueprint_id.title: Blueprint Id

blueprint_version.description: Blueprint version bound when generation started.
blueprint_version.title: Blueprint Version

candidate_id.description: Logical candidate identity when the message concerns a candidate.
candidate_id.title: Candidate Id

candidate_version.description: Exact candidate version; latest aliases are prohibited.
candidate_version.title: Candidate Version

block_id.description: Exact block identity for block-scoped messages.
block_id.title: Block Id

envelope_id.description: Globally unique envelope identity generated at message creation.
envelope_id.title: Envelope Id

event_type.description: Stable event name from the Topic 3 event catalog.
event_type.title: Event Type

message_kind.description: Command, event, result, or standardized error receipt.

tenant_id.description: Tenant boundary sourced only from authenticated server context.
tenant_id.title: Tenant Id

session_id.description: Learning-session identity from the frozen Topic 1/2 session model.
session_id.title: Session Id

subject_ref.description: Tokenized user or service subject reference; never raw PII.
subject_ref.title: Subject Ref

correlation_id.description: Root workflow correlation identity preserved across agents.
correlation_id.title: Correlation Id

causation_id.description: Envelope identity that directly caused this message.
causation_id.title: Causation Id

sequence.description: Monotonic sequence inside the partition key, assigned by the producer.
sequence.title: Sequence

producer.description: Producing agent/service provenance supplied by runtime infrastructure.

delivery.description: At-least-once delivery, retry, priority, and expiry metadata.

resource.description: Optional blueprint/candidate/block identity for resource messages.

trace_id.description: Distributed trace identity generated or propagated by infrastructure.
trace_id.title: Trace Id

span_id.description: Current trace span identity when tracing is enabled.
span_id.title: Span Id

created_at.description: UTC message creation time from the producing service clock.
created_at.title: Created At

error.description: Standard error receipt, required only when message_kind is ERROR.

payload.description: Agent-specific versioned payload; validated by the owning payload schema.
payload.title: Payload
